Prism selections demo

P13 — point + interval selections, cross-chart broadcast, URL state.

Serve from the repo root (e.g. python3 -m http.server) and visit /testdata/browser/selections-demo.html. Selection events fire as prism:select CustomEvents (see the log at the bottom). The browser hash updates with the active selection state so the URL is shareable.

1. Point selection (click bars to toggle highlight)

2. Interval brush (drag across the time series)

3. Cross-chart filter via <prism-coordinator>

Click a brand in the overview → detail chart highlights matching points (shared selection ID brand_focus).

Event log
